name: Eckles Khan Delman — (no cap yet)
description:
Small chit-chat:

Yeahhh, Chapter 201 of "Villains Are Destined To Die" inspired me a lot:D Eckles's stubborn feelings were parts belongs to Penelope and himself for twisted them all~

And I thought how it would be if things weren't that way, so here we are ( ́・∀・`)

I'm the 'Mary Sue' kind that make fanfics of 'happy endings' for anyone, you can leave if it triggers you, I don't mind (* ́ ▽ ` *)

And I think this manhwa should have its tag too, but I haven't deciced which transilation is perfect yet (* ́ω`*)

Reynold's bot next in two weeks, one if I survive my middle second terms, see you:3
